description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in futuristic urban attire, featuring a high-collared jacket with an asymmetrical shoulder guard and a scarf or mask covering the lower face. The jacket is fitted and layered, with a prominent shoulder pad on the left side and a utility pouch on the right hip. The figure wears slim, tactical pants tucked into high, reinforced boots, and fingerless gloves that add to the utilitarian look. The head is adorned with short, neatly styled hair and futuristic eyewear or goggles. The overall design suggests a blend of street fashion and tactical gear, suitable for a modern or near-future city environment. The posture is upright and alert, with arms slightly extended and hands relaxed.
description: A futuristic adult male in tactical urban clothing with a high-collared jacket, shoulder guard, mask, and utility accessories. The figure stands upright, exuding a modern, streetwise presence.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high-collared jacket, shoulder guard, mask, goggles, and utility pouch, with both arms visible and boots clearly defined.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the shoulder guard, the layered jacket, and the slim fit of the pants and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the jacket, the shoulder guard's extension, the pouch on the right hip, and the back of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the smooth jacket back, the absence of a shoulder guard on this side, and the profile of the boots and gloves.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic tactical jacket with high collar, asymmetrical shoulder guard, scarf or mask, slim tactical pants, and fingerless gloves
